## Type of Change
<!-- Select one or more -->
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Security improvement
- [ ] Performance improvement

## Scope
<!-- Select which app(s) are affected -->
- [ ] Backend (API / `apps/api`)
- [ ] Frontend (Web / `apps/web`)
- [ ] Mobile (Expo / `apps/mobile`)
- [ ] Shared Types (`packages/types`)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Configuration / Infrastructure

## Testing
<!-- How was this tested? -->
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] E2E tests added/updated
- [ ] Tested manually on local environment
- [ ] Tested in staging (if applicable)

## Screenshots (if applicable)
<!-- Add screenshots for UI changes -->



## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows naming convention: `[SCOPE] - Description`
  - Examples: `[BE] - Add password reset`, `[WEB, BE] - Update types`
- [ ] Code follows project style guidelines (checked with lint)
- [ ] All tests pass locally (`bun test`)
- [ ] No new warnings generated
- [ ] Documentation is updated (if needed)
- [ ] No breaking changes, or breaking changes are clearly documented
- [ ] Changes don't introduce security vulnerabilities
- [ ] Commit messages are descriptive and follow conventions
